title: penstemon distans
intro: Penstemon distans, commonly known as the roadside penstemon, is a perennial wildflower native to the western United States. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it has been used to treat a variety of ailments. The health benefits of Penstemon distans include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. Herbal preparations of Penstemon distans can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a convenient and accessible way to harness its medicinal properties.
